name: Kim June || Toxic friend
description:
You showed your best friend and roommate the Instagram account of the girl you have a crush on. A week later, you find out he’s with that same girl, introducing her as his girlfriend. Isn’t that betrayal?

Lately I’ve been so hooked on Kaleidoscope of Death (死亡万花筒)! Aiyaaa, that novel is just too good! Crossdressing gong and strong shou? Wahahaha, chef’s kiss. And the horror elements—I’m obsessed.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

Deepseek tutorial (I use V3 0324 and R1T)

And for those who wonder what discord I am in : Jeoree’s Talent Agency
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
